title: FATHIYA Apps/GPTs Routing Map v1
summary: Structured parse of the Apps/GPTs routing spreadsheet: GPT/LLM is the transformation layer, Zapier/Make/n8n orchestrate Y->X->Z, state lives outside the model, and validation/logging/guardrails are required. The map captures 173 app rows, 29 GPT rows, and 3 workflow templates.
key_principles: Route GPTs to transformation, extraction, analysis, scenario generation, and structured output; do not route them as execution decision makers.
Use Zapier, Make, or n8n for orchestration, triggers, delivery, and tool sequencing.
Keep state, memory, queue status, logs, receipts, tasks, and source references outside the model.
Trading/finance-like GPTs must remain analysis/scenario-only with explicit decision blocks.
Every activated workflow requires validation, logging, and guardrails before side effects.
boundary: Routing knowledge and guardrail artifact only. No webhooks, emails, trades, scans, credentials, destructive actions, or workflow activations are performed.
